summary: Iteration 12 — all 5 improvements verified. File-size estimates render on all 3 resolutions with correct scaling (HD~220MB, FHD~348MB=1.58x, 4K~862MB=3.92x — matches spec of ~1.6x/~4x). 4K duration warning renders on 356s Barbaad Saiyaara song with correct 'This song is 356s (> 180s)' text. Convert-mode-picker visible with single active by default, multi activates on click. Multi-track piano stack shows 2 secondary rows for 3-track multi_track song. Single-track Twinkle demo shows no stack (regression pass). Audio-to-MIDI: existing test_piano_scale returns clean 8-note C major scale (60,62,64,65,67,69,71,72) all in piano range, sorted, ~0.6s spacing (well quantized).
passed: convert-mode-picker visible, default single active (cyan), multi activates on click
size-hd/fhd/4k render inside resolution buttons with correct bitrate scaling (1.58x FHD, 3.92x 4K)
fourk-duration-warning visible for 356s song with '(> 180s)' text
track-piano-stack renders 2 track-stack-* rows for 3-track multi_track song, below main piano
Single-track Twinkle demo does NOT render track-piano-stack (regression OK)
Improved audioToMidi: test_piano_scale extracted as clean C major scale (8 notes, sorted, in piano range, ~0.6s quantized IOI)
GET /api/songs returns 10 songs with tracks array populated for multi_track songs (length=3)
notes: Did not perform a fresh multi-mode WAV upload (existing test_piano_scale from prior iteration used to validate algorithm quality). Multi-track split behavior on convert-mode-multi upload flow is unverified end-to-end but the UI mode-switch works and the code path exists per code review.
